detail: Proximity dock dropped in cleanly; cached-rect approach kept it smooth.
No canonical token/role for a recurring reminder chip; had to invent one.
suggestedChange: Add a Reminder status-tag role with a recurrence variant.

detail: Needed a reminder chip for revisit prompts; nothing canonical existed.
Overrode the atelier accent to match brand blue.
Unclear whether to label group-only visibility as 'Group' or 'Members'; inferred 'Group'.
Same visibility-label ambiguity for Circle scope; inferred 'Circle'.
Muted text on the light-scheme accent fails WCAG AA contrast on small text.
suggestedChange: Darken --ls-text-muted in light scheme or forbid muted text on accent.
